metadata.title: Australian State/Territory MPs LGBTIQ+ Voting Records
metadata.description: Comprehensive voting records on LGBTIQ+ issues for all state and territory electoral divisions

methodology.description: Alignment scores calculated from recorded parliamentary votes on LGBTIQ+ related legislation at state/territory level
methodology.calculation: (Pro-LGBTIQ+ votes / Total tracked votes) × Base party score adjustment
methodology.note: This is a template structure. Actual MP data and voting records need to be compiled from state parliament sources.

metadata.disclaimer: This tool presents objective voting records from state parliaments. We do not endorse any politician or party. Use this data to make informed decisions about who represents you.
metadata.data_note: MP details populated with realistic sample data based on typical state election patterns. Real MP names and voting records should be compiled from state parliament sources.

NSW.name: Conversion Practices Ban Act 2024
NSW.description: Criminalized conversion practices. Took effect April 2025.

NSW.name: LGBTQ hate crimes inquiry - Legislative response

VIC.name: Change or Suppression (Conversion) Practices Prohibition Bill 2020
VIC.description: Most comprehensive conversion practices ban at the time. Fines up to $200,000 or 10 years jail. Took effect February 2022.

VIC.name: Sex Discrimination Amendment Bill 2019 (Gender Recognition reforms)
VIC.description: Removed mandatory sexual reassignment surgery requirement. Allows self-nomination: male, female, or gender diverse/non-binary.

VIC.name: Sex Discrimination Amendment Bill 2023 (Free gender recognition)
VIC.description: Removed all fees and costs for birth certificate changes (November 2025). First in Australia.

VIC.name: Equal Opportunity Act amendments 2021 (LGBTIQ+ protections expansion)
VIC.description: Religious exceptions amendments, expanded LGBTIQ+ protections

VIC.name: LGBTIQA+ Community Commissioner establishment
VIC.description: First LGBTIQA+ Community Commissioner in Australia

QLD.name: Health Legislation Amendment Bill 2019 - Conversion Practices Ban
QLD.description: FIRST jurisdiction nationwide to pass. Maximum penalty: 18 months imprisonment + fines. Queensland first globally for statutory conversion practices ban.

QLD.name: Anti-Discrimination Amendment (Sexual Orientation, Gender Identity and Intersex) Bill 2016
Criminal Law (Historical Convictions Expungement) Bill 2017
QLD.description: Allows gay male homosexuality convictions to be expunged

QLD.name: Gender Recognition - Birth Certificate Changes (Divorce requirement repeal)
QLD.description: Repeal of divorce requirements for gender marker changes

QLD.name: Gender Recognition - Surgery requirement repeal 2024
QLD.description: Repeal of surgery requirements for gender marker changes

QLD.name: Anti-Discrimination Act Reform amendments 2024-2025
QLD.description: CRITICAL: Comprehensive reform package to modernise Anti-Discrimination Act (first update in 30 years). Originally due 1 July 2025. PAUSED indefinitely by government (March 2025). Would have strengthened protections across sectors.

WA.name: Conversion Practices Ban (PENDING)
WA.description: Committed 2022, delayed until after 2025 election (Sept 2024 decision). Will include criminal penalties + civil response scheme.

WA.name: Births, Deaths, Marriages Registration Amendment (Sex or Gender Changes) Bill 2024
WA.description: Streamlined gender recognition process. Abolishes Gender Reassignment Board. No longer requires medical/surgical reassignment (clinical treatment now optional). Allows 'non-binary' sex descriptor.

WA.name: Assisted Reproductive Technology and Surrogacy Bill 2025
WA.description: Removes discriminatory barriers: same-sex couples, trans, intersex, single people can access ART/surrogacy. LGBTIQ+ family rights expansion.

WA.name: Gay Conviction Expungement Bill 2018
WA.description: Allows convictions for consensual gay sex (pre-1990) to be expunged

SA.name: Conversion Practices Prohibition Act 2024
SA.description: Took effect April 2025. Penalties: Up to 5 years jail for causing serious harm, 3 years for facilitation/arranging removal from state.

SA.name: Statutes Amendment (Abolition of Defence of Provocation and Related Matters) Act 2020
Birth, Deaths and Marriages Registration (Gender Identity) Amendment Act 2016
SA.description: Simpler gender recognition process. Removed surgery requirement.

TAS.name: Conversion Practices Ban (PROPOSED)
TAS.description: Status: Under consideration. Get update when introduced/passed.

TAS.name: Gender Recognition Act amendments 2019
TAS.description: MOST PROGRESSIVE gender-optional birth certificate laws in the world (2019). Removes forced divorce requirement. Removes sexual reassignment surgery requirement. Only requires simple declaration. Allows parents to choose gender on birth certificates. Allows removal of gender descriptor entirely. Lowers age for gender change without parental permission to 16. Includes non-binary gender option. Intersex children: extended time for birth registration (to 120 days).

TAS.name: Historical Convictions Compensation Scheme 2025
TAS.description: FIRST Australian compensation fund for past homosexuality & cross-dressing convictions. Covers pre-1997 (homosexuality) and pre-2002 (cross-dressing) convictions. Potentially 100+ individuals.

ACT.name: Gender Recognition Bill / Equality Bill 2024
ACT.description: Removes clinical treatment requirement for gender recognition. Expands gender descriptors beyond male/female. Leading gender recognition reform.

NT.name: Conversion Practices protections (PROPOSED)
NT.description: Status: Not yet law. Get update when introduced/passed.

NT.name: Anti-Discrimination Amendment Act 2025
NT.description: LGBTIQ+ anti-discrimination protections. Part 3: Not yet commenced (note).
